chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 1618 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 19-04-2023 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for respondents-SMC. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel appearing on behalf of respondents-SMC files statement to the effect that difference of pension bill amounting to Rs.87,572/- has been paid to the petitioner through cheque dated 18.04.2023; statement is taken on record and copy whereof is supplied to learned counsel for the petitioner, who while referring to prayer clause(a) of the petition states that husband of petitioner’s daughter was also an employee, who died and she is not receiving pension from June, 2022. Perusal of the memo of petition shows that it bears misconceived and vague facts of the matter as the same neither shows name of petitioner’s daughter nor the name of her deceased husband so also date of his death. Hence, petition to the extent of prayer clause (a) is dismissed with direction to petitioner to file fresh petition by furnishing complete particulars of the petitioner’s daughter with regard to her claim of pensionery benefits of her deceased husband. So far prayer clause (b) of the petition is concerned that has already been satisfied by the respondents-SMC. Accordingly, instant petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
